name: Ryu-Ge Realm - Sea Spires
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>登</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>瀧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
You can only control 1 "Ryu-Ge Realm - Sea Spires". Your "Ryu-Ge" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monsters, and Level 10 or higher monsters whose original Type is Sea Serpent, that you control, gain this effect.
● Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell you control on the bottom of the Deck, then target 1 card on the field; return it to the hand.
eff:
You can only control 1 "Ryu-Ge Realm - Sea Spires". Your "Ryu-Ge" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monsters, and Level 10 or higher monsters whose original Type is Sea Serpent, that you control, gain this effect.
● Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell you control on the bottom of the Deck, then target 1 card on the field; return it to the hand.

action: Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck for cost
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
